display.purpose: Hero name only, one per page.

shadows.name: ambient-hero
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the single hero product shot (Hawat chat widget preview). No other element uses a shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quint for reveals and state transitions.

motion.name: particle-drift
motion.purpose: Slow continuous drift for the hero particle field; the only perpetual animation on the page.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #14161a; color: #fafafa; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 14px; border: none; font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3b3f47; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d3fd6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fafafa; color: #14161a; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e4e5e9; font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f2f5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d3fd6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Skill tag or quick-reply chip. The one place full-pill radius is correct.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #f1f2f5; color: #14161a; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #e4e5e9; } .ds-chip.is-active { border: 1px solid #1d3fd6; }

components.name: Project Card (light)
components.description: Standard supporting project card: border only, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e5e9; border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px; } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #14161a; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card p { font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; color: #3b3f47; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Featured Project Card (dark)
components.description: The one high-contrast dark card, reserved for the Featured Projects gallery lead item.
components.html:
InvenioAI

Enterprise document intelligence platform.

Read case study →
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: #0f1115; color: #fafafa; border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px; } .ds-card-dark h3 { font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-dark p { color: #9a9ea6; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-card-dark a { color: #8fa3ed; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-dark a:hover { color: #e8ecfd; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky solid nav bar, no blur, 1px bottom border, fully labeled links.
components.html: flxhrdynProjectsExperience
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #fafafa; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e5e9; padding: 16px 32px; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #14161a; } .ds-nav a { font-family: 'General Sans', sans-serif; color: #3b3f47; text-decoration: none; margin: 0 12px; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: #1d3fd6; }

narrative.overview: Most of this portfolio should feel as still, precise, and confident as a well-documented codebase: one ink color, one accent, generous whitespace, no ornament that isn't earning its place. Against that quiet, exactly one thing is allowed to be alive — a sparse, slow-drifting particle field in the hero, framing the name rather than competing with it. The rest of the page holds its composure so that one signal reads as deliberate, not decorative. This system explicitly rejects the AI-portfolio scaffolding this project has iterated away from: glassmorphism nav bars and cards, WebGL sparkle fields that never rest, rounded-full pills on every button/tag/card, tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows repeated above every section, and three identical project cards in a row. It is inspired by Google Antigravity's marketing site (motion, scale, confidence) and Apple's product pages (stillness, precision, real depth over decoration) — never a visual clone of either.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (cobalt), used deliberately rather than diluted across dozens of badges
One animated signature moment (hero particles); everything else at rest
Borders over shadows; shadows over glass
A dark, high-contrast project gallery as the one bold visual break on an otherwise light page

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Cobalt is the only saturated color on the page. No secondary or tertiary accent hues; no rainbow of pastel badge tints.

rules.name: The One Motion Rule
rules.body: Only the hero particle field moves continuously. Every other surface is static at rest; motion elsewhere is limited to state transitions.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One sans family (General Sans) carries display through body via weight and scale, not a second competing sans. Mono is the only second family, reserved for data-shaped content.

rules.name: The Border-Not-Blur Rule
rules.body: Cards, nav, and chat widget separate from their background with a single Line border. No backdrop-filter, no glass, no drop shadow stacked on top of a border.

dos: Do keep exactly one accent color (Cobalt #1d3fd6) and let it carry real weight in the hero particles and the dark project gallery, not just 10% restrained badges.
Do keep the hero particle field animated, sparse, and edge-concentrated — this is the system's one permitted 'alive' moment.
Do use a single 1px Line border for all separation; reserve the one ambient shadow for the hero product shot only.
Do verify all body text (Ink and Soft Ink) hits ≥4.5:1 against Paper and Surface.
donts: Don't bring back glassmorphism: no backdrop-blur on nav, cards, or the chat widget.
Don't use rounded-full (pill) shape on anything except chips/tags — cards and buttons stay at 14px.
Don't repeat the small uppercase tracked label ('PERSONAL PORTFOLIO' style) above more than one section on the page.
Don't ship three identical same-size project cards in a row; the featured project always carries more visual weight than the supporting two.
Don't pair a border with a soft wide drop shadow on the same element (the 'ghost-card' pattern) — pick one.
Don't default the body font to Inter, Space Grotesk, DM Sans, or Plus Jakarta Sans — General Sans is the committed choice specifically because it isn't one of these.
Don't let any surface other than the hero particle field move continuously; every other animation is a one-time state transition or reveal.
